items.title: Software stocks tank, analysts see opportunities: Stocks & Markets Podcast
items.description: Software-mageddon may sound like a Seventies disaster movie, but for investors, it was all too real. The term describes the recent sell-off in software and tech stocks, driven by fears that generative AI companies could make traditional software firms irrelevant. As of Feb. 9, the North American ...

items.title: Salesforce Wins US$5.6b Army Deal As Government Role Expands
items.description: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) secured a US$5.6b contract with the U.S. Army to provide digital and AI-backed solutions for mission-critical operations. The company also joined the EMBERPOINT public-private partnership with Lockheed Martin, PG&E, and Wells Fargo to support wildfire response capabilities. These developments expand Salesforce’s presence in government, public safety, and infrastructure focused use cases beyond its commercial customer base. For investors watching NYSE:CRM, this move...
